                                     PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER STATUS LOG FIELDS




Private Access (ZPA)
Understanding User Status Log Fields
The Log Streaming Service (LSS) can send User Status log information to any third-party log analytics
tool. By default, the User Status log type includes the fields listed in the following table for each log
template (i.e., CSV, JSON, TSV). While configuring your log receiver, you can edit the default log stream
content to capture only specific fields, and create a custom log template.
    View an example User Status log.

         {"LogTimestamp": "Fri May 31 17:34:48 2019","Customer": "ANZ Team/zdemo in beta","User
         name": "ZPA LSS Client","SessionID": "cKgzUERSLl09Y+ytH8v5","SessionStatus": "ZPN_STAT
         US_AUTHENTICATED","Version": "19.12.0-36-g87dad18","ZEN": "broker1b.pdx2","Certificate
         CN": "slogger1b.pdx2.zpabeta.net","PrivateIP": "","PublicIP": "34.216.108.5","Latitud
         e": 45.000000,"Longitude": -119.000000,"CountryCode": "US","TimestampAuthentication":
         "2019-05-29T21:18:38.000Z","TimestampUnAuthentication": "","TotalBytesRx": 31274866,"T
         otalBytesTx": 25424152,"Idp": "Example IDP Config","Hostname": "DESKTOP-2K299HC","Plat
         form": "windows","ClientType": "zpn_client_type_zapp","TrustedNetworks": "TN1_stc1","T
         rustedNetworksNames": "145248739466947538","SAMLAttributes": "myname:jdoe,myemail:jdoe
         @zscaler.com","PosturesHit": "sm-posture1,sm-posture2","PosturesMisses": "sm-posture1
         1,sm-posture12","ZENLatitude": 47.000000,"ZENLongitude": -122.000000,"ZENCountryCode":
         "", "FQDNRegistered": "0","FQDNRegisteredError": "","City": "San Jose", "MicroTenantI
         D": "145257480799129312"}




The following table includes descriptions and supported field format specifications for each field within
the template. To learn more about the format specifications listed for each field, including examples,
see Understanding the Log Stream Content Format.

                                                                        Supported Field Format
 Field                              Description                         Specifications
                                                                             %[OPT]s
                                    The timestamp when the log               %[OPT]j
 LogTimestamp
                                    was generated                            %[OPT]J

                                                                             %[OPT]s
                                                                             %[OPT]j
 Customer                           The customer name                        %[OPT]J
                                                                             %[OPT]o


                                                                             ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   1
                PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER STATUS LOG FIELDS




                                                 Supported Field Format
Field           Description                      Specifications
                                                     %[OPT]s
                                                     %[OPT]j
Username        The user name                        %[OPT]J
                                                     %[OPT]o

                                                     %[OPT]s
                                                     %[OPT]j
SessionID       The TLS session ID                   %[OPT]J
                                                     %[OPT]o

                The status of the session. The
                expected values for this field
                are:
                     ZPN_STATUS_AUTHENTIC
                     ATED: The user
                     successfully
                     authenticated in Private
                     Access                          %[OPT]s
                     ZPN_STATUS_AUTH_FAIL            %[OPT]j
SessionStatus        ED: The user failed to          %[OPT]J
                     authenticate in Private         %[OPT]o
                     Access
                     ZPN_STATUS_DISCONNE
                     CTED: The user
                     connected from a Public
                     Service Edge for Private
                     Access or a Private
                     Service Edge for Private
                     Access

Version         The Zscaler Client Connector         %[OPT]s
                version                              %[OPT]j
                                                     %[OPT]J

                                                     ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   2
                PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER STATUS LOG FIELDS




                                                  Supported Field Format
Field           Description                       Specifications
                                                      %[OPT]o

                                                      %[OPT]s
                The Public Service Edge that          %[OPT]j
ZEN                                                   %[OPT]J
                was selected for the connection
                                                      %[OPT]o

                                                      %[OPT]s
                                                      %[OPT]j
CertificateCN   The certificate common name           %[OPT]J
                                                      %[OPT]o

                                                      %[OPT]s
                The private IP address of             %[OPT]j
PrivateIP                                             %[OPT]J
                Zscaler Client Connector
                                                      %[OPT]o

                                                      %[OPT]s
                The public IP address of              %[OPT]j
PublicIP                                              %[OPT]J
                Zscaler Client Connector
                                                      %[OPT]o

                The latitude coordinate of the        %[OPT]f
Latitude        Zscaler Client Connector              %[OPT]o
                location
                The longitude coordinate of the       %[OPT]f
Longitude       Zscaler Client Connector              %[OPT]o
                location
                                                      %[OPT]s
                The country code of the               %[OPT]j
CountryCode     Zscaler Client Connector              %[OPT]J
                location                              %[OPT]o

                            PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER STATUS LOG FIELDS




                                                              Supported Field Format
Field                       Description                       Specifications

                            Timestamp in microseconds             %[OPT]s
TimestampAuthentication     when Zscaler Client Connector         %[OPT]j
                            was authenticated                     %[OPT]J

                            Timestamp in microseconds             %[OPT]s
TimestampUnAuthentication   when Zscaler Client Connector         %[OPT]j
                            was unauthenticated                   %[OPT]J

                                                                  %[OPT]d
                                                                  %[OPT]x
TotalBytesRx                The total bytes received              %[OPT]f
                                                                  %[OPT]o

                                                                  %[OPT]d
                                                                  %[OPT]x
TotalBytesTx                The total bytes transmitted           %[OPT]f
                                                                  %[OPT]o

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                            The name of the identity              %[OPT]j
Idp                         provider (IdP) as configured in       %[OPT]J
                            the Zscaler Admin Console             %[OPT]o

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                            The name of the device as             %[OPT]j
Hostname                    reported by Zscaler Client            %[OPT]J
                            Connector                             %[OPT]o

                                                                  %[OPT]s
                            The platform on the device as         %[OPT]j
Platform                    reported by Zscaler Client            %[OPT]J
                            Connector                             %[OPT]o



                                                                  ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   4
                       PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER STATUS LOG FIELDS




                                                          Supported Field Format
Field                  Description                        Specifications
                                                              %[OPT]s
                       The client type for the request        %[OPT]j
ClientType             (i.e., Zscaler Client Connector,       %[OPT]J
                       ZPA LSS, or Web Browser)               %[OPT]o

                       The unique IDs for the trusted         %[OPT]s
                       networks that Zscaler Client           %[OPT]j
TrustedNetworks                                               %[OPT]J
                       Connector has determined for
                       this device                            %[OPT]o

                       The names for the trusted              %[OPT]s
                       networks that Zscaler Client           %[OPT]j
TrustedNetworksNames                                          %[OPT]J
                       Connector has determined for
                       this device                            %[OPT]o

                                                              %[OPT]s
                       The list of SAML attributes            %[OPT]j
SAMLAttributes
                       reported by the IdP                    %[OPT]J

                                                              %[OPT]s
                       The posture profiles that              %[OPT]j
PosturesHit            Zscaler Client Connector               %[OPT]J
                       verified for this device               %[OPT]o

                                                              %[OPT]s
                       The posture profiles that              %[OPT]j
PosturesMiss           Zscaler Client Connector failed        %[OPT]J
                       to verify for this device              %[OPT]o

                       The latitude coordinates for the       %[OPT]f
ZENLatitude                                                   %[OPT]o
                       Public Service Edge




                                                              ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   5
                      PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER STATUS LOG FIELDS




                                                         Supported Field Format
Field                 Description                        Specifications

                      The longitude coordinates for          %[OPT]f
ZENLongitude                                                 %[OPT]o
                      the Public Service Edge

                                                             %[OPT]s
                      The country code for the Public        %[OPT]j
ZENCountryCode                                               %[OPT]J
                      Service Edge
                                                             %[OPT]o

                      The status of the hostname for
                      the client-to-client connection.       %[OPT]s
FQDNRegistered
                      The expected values for this
                      field are true or false.
FQDNRegisteredError   The status of the registered           %[OPT]s
                      hostname. The expected value
                      if the hostname matches the
                      regular expression is
                      FQDN_MATCH. The expected
                      values if the hostname does not
                      match the regular expression
                      are:
                           FQDN_NO_MATCH: The
                           hostname does not match
                           with the configured
                           regular expression
                           FQDN_BAD_SCHEMA:
                           Client-to-client
                           communication is disabled
                           for the Public Service
                           Edge
                           FQDN_BAD_REGEX: The
                           configured regular
                           expression in the Zscaler


                                                             ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   6
                PRIVATE ACCESS (ZPA) : UNDERSTANDING USER STATUS LOG FIELDS




                                                   Supported Field Format
Field           Description                        Specifications
                     Admin Console is
                     incorrect
                     FQDN_TOO_MANY_REGEX
                     : Invalid regular
                     expression configuration
                     due to multiple configured
                     regular expressions
                     FQDN_NO_ENTRIES: Your
                     admin has not configured
                     a regular expression in the
                     Zscaler Admin Console
                     FQDN_EMPTY: The FQDN
                     received from the Zscaler
                     Client Connector is null or
                     empty
                     BROKER_NOT_ENABLED:
                     Client-to-client
                     communication is disabled
                     for the Public Service
                     Edge
                     CUSTOMER_NOT_ENABLE
                     D: Client-to-client
                     communication is disabled
                     for the current customer

                                                       %[OPT]s
City            The city of the client                 %[OPT]j

                The Microtenant ID of the user         %[OPT]s
MicroTenantID                                          %[OPT]j
                accessing the application
